mechanism_narrative: A sustained low level of the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future equity cash flows, directly supporting higher S&P 500 valuations and generating positive forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns are not significantly higher than baseline during periods of low rates.

mechanism_narrative: The joint occurrence of high unemployment and stagnant non-farm payrolls signals severe labor market slack and weak consumer demand, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts exceeding 500,000 units indicate stabilization in the construction sector and broader economic recovery, predicting positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are negative in > 55% of instances where housing starts exceed 500k.

mechanism_narrative: A Consumer Price Index above 220 triggers market expectations of monetary tightening or inflation risk premiums, compressing equity multiples and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns are positive in > 60% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: A high Industrial Production Index reflects robust manufacturing activity and immediate economic output, supporting positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in > 55% of instances where INDPRO is in the top quartile.

mechanism_narrative: Strong retail sales despite high unemployment indicate consumer resilience and sustained demand, predicting positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
regime_hint: labor market weakness with demand resilience
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20-day returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the positive signal.

mechanism_narrative: Unemployment exceeding 9.0% signals severe labor market distress and reduced consumer spending power, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are positive in > 60% of instances where unemployment exceeds 9.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP above 13,000 billion chained 2017 dollars indicates the economy has recovered significant output, supporting long-term earnings growth and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are negative in > 55% of instances where GDP exceeds 13,000 billion.
